title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Describe the area where you live. What do you like about it?
Have you always lived in the same place, or have you moved around?
Would you prefer to live in a city, a small town or the countryside?
What would your ideal home be like?
What do you like most and least about where you live?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: What do you think makes a neighbourhood a good place to live?
Do you think cities are becoming too big and impersonal?
Would you sacrifice space or location for a cheaper home?
